event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result status codes: MSP = missing punch; DNF = did not finish; NC = not competing; DQ = disqualified; OVT = overtime; DNS = did not start.
Source note: a starred time indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, MSP, or DNF.
